heading: Grants for State consumer protection offices by Secretary
label: 6805 Grants for State consumer protection offices by Secretary
notes: Amendments1978—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”, meaning Administrator of the Federal Energy Administration.Pub. L. 95–617
amendments: Amendments1978—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”, meaning Administrator of the Federal Energy Administration.Pub. L. 95–617

children.heading: Establishment, operation, and purpose; qualifications for funds
children.label: a Establishment, operation, and purpose; qualifications for funds

children.text: make general factual assessments of the impact of proposed rate changes and other proposed regulatory actions upon all affected consumers;
assist consumers in the presentation of their positions before utility regulatory commissions; and
advocate, on its own behalf, a position which it determines represents the position most advantageous to consumers, taking into account developments in rate design reform.

children.heading: Grants subject to State assurances on funds
children.label: b Grants subject to State assurances on funds
children.text: Grants pursuant to subsection (a) of this section shall be made only to States which furnish such assurances as the Secretary may require that funds made available under such section will be in addition to, and not in substitution for, funds made available to offices of consumer services from other sources.

children.heading: Offices established by Tennessee Valley Authority
children.label: c Offices established by Tennessee Valley Authority
children.text: Assistance may be provided under this section to an office of consumer services established by the Tennessee Valley Authority, if such office is operated independently of the Tennessee Valley Authority.
